title: Supply Chain Manager - Rhenus Logistics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Rhenus Logistics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Rhenus Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rhenus Logistics India:
Rhenus Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rhenus Logistics India!
